compliance.note: OPERATOR OVERRIDE — real court-ordered listing data AND real per-listing photos published on the public LP during the bridge period, before GVR WebAPI authorization. Standard rule is research-tier only (see scripts/scrape-foreclosure-deals.mjs header). Override accepted and directed by Amir Omidvar; flagged for managing-broker awareness (Shirin Saleh, licence #X031527) — CREA Code-of-Ethics / MLS display exposure on her licence. Listing photos were supplied by the managing broker from 88 West's own MLS member access (Paragon), per operator direction, on the stated basis of 88 West's display authorization. Photo authorization is per-listing — listings that close or withdraw are removed in subsequent refreshes (the 2026-05-16 set had 9 listings; 3 closed/withdrew between 2026-05-16 and 2026-06-11, so this refresh ships 6 confirmed-active listings rather than padding with photo-reuse). To stay as defensible as possible: street numbers fully removed (street name + neighbourhood only); MLS numbers removed from the published cards and from public-facing image filenames (retained only in the research dump foreclosure-deals.scraped.json); no listing remarks, no agent names. Replace this file with the GVR-feed-backed source once the WebAPI is authorized — IDX feeds license per-listing photos and auto-refresh, which is the permanent fix.

refreshHistory.note: 3 listings closed/withdrew (College Park Port Moody, False Creek Vancouver, Park Royal West Vancouver); 6 remaining confirmed active via 3-aggregator scrape
